tasks.instruction: From paying programs that have been running between 10 and 60 days, compare any two by their 30-day total return and bookmark the one with the higher 30-day total return.

tasks.instruction: Find a currently paying program launched within the last 7 days that has a 5/5 user payout rating and cast a cautious vote in its community poll indicating you will not invest.

poll.question: Would you consider investing in NovaYield 7D this week?

tasks.instruction: In your account settings, configure your dashboard to show only active programs with at least 1.5% daily ROI, display all values in USD, hide closed programs, and enable in-site notifications when watchlisted programs change status or risk level.
